title: silene gallica var. occitanica
intro: Silene gallica var. occitanica, also known as Occitan pink or pink catchfly, is a flowering plant belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) and is a variant of the white campion (Silene gallica). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Silene gallica var. occitanica include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant may be found in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
